company: Shanghai United Imaging Healthcare Co., Ltd.
intended_use: uOmnispace.CT is a software for viewing, manipulating, evaluating and analyzing medical images. It supports interpretation and evaluation of examinations within healthcare institutions.
intended_use_full: uOmnispace.CT is a software for viewing, manipulating, evaluating and analyzing medical images. It supports interpretation and evaluation of examinations within healthcare institutions.
target_condition: Multiple CT-based conditions including coronary artery disease, lung nodules, colorectal polyps, cerebral ischemia, cardiac function assessment, and liver lesions
ground_truth: Expert manual annotation/ground truth scoring for spine labeling algorithm; reference materials cited for calcium scoring comparison (MESA database)
other_metrics: Spine labeling algorithm: average score of ≥4 points on ground truth-based scoring system (acceptance criterion, results table incomplete)
